description: Rise of Avalon Patch 4 (9 September 2020) — Mobile Improvements, Corrupted Dungeon Changes, Satchels of Insight Changes, Duel Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance (Potions, Helmets, Daggers), Fixes.

sections.heading: Mobile Improvements
items: Chat window text can now be dragged vertically
Names in chat can now also be tapped to open the chat context menu (whisper, party, guild invitations, stats, muting/reporting)
Added "Text Size" option to the Chat Settings submenu
Added "Tab Settings" button inside the Chat Settings submenu
Added Chat Tab Settings to options
[iOS] Enabled bluetooth keyboard input on iOS
sections.searchable_text: Mobile Improvements chat drag vertical names context menu whisper party guild Text Size Tab Settings iOS bluetooth keyboard

sections.heading: Corrupted Dungeon Changes
sections.searchable_text: Corrupted Dungeon Demonic Shards Stalker 35% Slayer 66% health increase

subsections.heading: Corrupted Dungeon Changes
subsections.searchable_text: Demonic Shards Stalker 35% Slayer 66% health increased

changes.ability: Demonic Shards HP (Stalker and Slayer difficulty):
changes.raw_text: The health of Demonic Shards in Stalker and Slayer difficulty Corrupted Dungeons has been increased: Stalker: approx. 35% increase; Slayer: approx. 66% increase

sections.heading: Satchels of Insight Changes
sections.description: Ratio of Fame to Silver increases with higher Item Power, so upgrading to a better Satchel is always more efficient. Bonus Fame has been increased on Satchels with higher Item Power.
items: 700 IP: 1.85 Silver to Fame ratio | 10% Bonus Fame
1100 IP: 1.78 Silver to Fame ratio | 30% Bonus Fame
1500 IP: 1.75 Silver to Fame ratio | 64% Bonus Fame
sections.searchable_text: Satchels of Insight Fame Silver ratio Item Power 700 IP 1.85 10% 1100 IP 1.78 30% 1500 IP 1.75 64% Bonus Fame

sections.heading: Duel Changes
items: Once a duel starts, players will not be able to equip items to empty slots
When a duel is initiated, the duel will be canceled if either player changes their equipment
sections.searchable_text: Duel Changes equip empty slots equipment canceled initiated

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Reduced Silver output and Black Market order generation in extremely valuable areas to combat inflation (approx. 5% variance), affecting black zone cluster bonuses and areas derived from them such as Hellgates and some Corrupted Dungeon difficulties
The Guild Season 9 Reward Statues (Decoration Item) for 1st, 2nd, and 3rd place are now placeable
The chance for a Tier 4 Solo Random Dungeon Map to drop has been increased by approx. 50%
Mounted players will now receive Combat Log messages
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Silver Black Market inflation 5% black zone cluster Hellgates Corrupted Dungeons Guild Season 9 Statues Tier 4 Solo Random Dungeon Map 50% mounted Combat Log

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Potions Healing Potions Duration Helmets Emergency Heal Guardian Helmet Daggers Deadly Swipe Bloodthirsty Blade

subsections.heading: Potions
subsections.searchable_text: Potions Healing Potions Healing Duration 15s 10s Heal Value per second unchanged

changes.raw_text: Healing Potions: Healing Duration: 15s → 10s. Heal Value per second stays unchanged.
notes: Heal Value per second stays unchanged

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Emergency Heal Guardian Helmet Cooldown 30s 40s flat 150 healing max health

changes.raw_text: Emergency Heal (Guardian Helmet): Cooldown: 30s → 40s. Replaced the percentage healing with a flat 150 healing, independent of the caster's max health.
notes: Replaced the percentage healing with a flat 150 healing, independent of the caster's max health

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Deadly Swipe Energy Cost 3 6 Bloodthirsty Blade One-handed Additional Magic Damage vs Players 60 50

changes.raw_text: Bloodthirsty Blade (One-handed Daggers): Additional Magic Damage vs. Players: 60 → 50

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed an issue where moving items in or out of a container while splitting the stack with SHIFT+drag did not log it in the Chest Log
Fixed an issue where players continued to take damage after leaving the Energy Shaper's impact area
Fixed an issue where the shadows summoned by the Avalonian High Priestess would get trapped by unintended collisions
Fury stacks from Soldier Armor are now removed when changing zones as intended
Shift+clicking in Hideout Item Recovery now opens the individual item's recovery price for the player to accept as intended
Additional minor graphical, animation, terrain, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes SHIFT drag stack Chest Log Energy Shaper damage Avalonian High Priestess shadows collisions Fury Soldier Armor zones Hideout Item Recovery graphical animation terrain localization
